target_state: Proxy/global budget with reset window is enforced
acceptance_test: Exceed global budget and verify request rejection

target_state: Every tenant has monthly budget + soft/hard thresholds
acceptance_test: Trigger tenant overage and verify degrade/deny behavior

target_state: Usage-based entitlement source of truth is deployed
acceptance_test: Compare gateway usage and ledger totals within 1 percent drift

target_state: All keys enforce rpm/tpm with strict checks
gap: Key limits undefined for most consumers
acceptance_test: Burst above limit and verify 429 plus retry-after

target_state: Team-level quota and parallelism limits enforced
acceptance_test: Two keys in same team exceed quota and get throttled

target_state: Routing by latency/cost/capability configured

target_state: EU and non-EU traffic separated by policy

target_state: Over-context requests fallback to long-context model

target_state: Policy-blocked responses fallback to compliant model

target_state: Cooldown/allowed_fails configured per deployment

target_state: Outlier and ejection policies active in service mesh

target_state: Per-route timeout matrix exists by use-case class

target_state: Retries enabled only for safe operations
acceptance_test: Non-idempotent call is never retried automatically
